title: Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Warden, Accountant and More Posts
short_info: Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026: Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri has released the official notification for 17 Warden, Warden and More posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Warden: Minimum 30 years, Maximum 50 years. Part Time Teacher (English): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 35 years. Part Time Teacher (Math/Science): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 35 years. Part Time Teacher (Sanskrit): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 35 years. Accountant: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 35 years.

qualification.details: Warden: BA / BSc + BEd. Minimum 2 years' experience in managing an academic institution. Part Time Teacher (English): BA + B.Ed. Untrained Arts Graduates having English as (Hons.) will be preferred if trained candidates are not available. Candidates secured highest mark in English as subject will be considered if no candidates are available. Part Time Teacher (Math/Science): BSc + B.Ed. Untrained Science Graduates will be considered if trained candidates are not available. Part Time Teacher (Sanskrit): BA with Sanskrit or Sahitya Acharya. Accountant: B.Com with DCA.

salary_details.warden: Rs.25621/- (including EPF share of Employee & Employer)
salary_details.part time teacher (english) - kgbv: Rs.9075/- (including EPF share of Employee & Employer)
salary_details.part time teacher (math/science) - kgbv: Rs.9075/- (including EPF share of Employee & Employer)
salary_details.part time teacher (sanskrit) - kgbv: Rs.9075/- (including EPF share of Employee & Employer)
salary_details.part time teacher (sanskrit) - ncsbav: Rs.9075/- for trained and Rs.8075/- for Untrained (including EPF share)
salary_details.part time teacher (math/science) - ncsba: Rs.9075/- for trained and Rs.8075/- for Untrained (including EPF)
salary_details.part time teacher (english) - ncsbav: Rs.9075/- for trained and Rs.8075/- for Untrained (including EPF)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.malkangiri.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
